displayNameZh: 把 API Key 给 Claude Code
summary: Yt Cloudflare Api Key component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「把 API Key 给 Claude Code」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-cloudflare-api-key/src/YtCloudflareApiKey.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtCloudflareApiKey` and `ytCloudflareApiKeyDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Cloudflare Api Key Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-cloudflare-api-key to my project. Preserve the exported YtCloudflareApiKeyProps API and register the YtCloudflareApiKey composition with the default props.
